# Horizon Care Services — Full Reference

## Company Overview

**Name:** Horizon Care Services Ltd
**Company No.:** 14615041
**ICO Registration:** Registered with the Information Commissioner's Office
**Office address:** 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Cheetham Hill, Manchester, M8 9LR
**Phone:** 020 3757 2767 (Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm)
**Email:** contact@horizoncareservices.org
**Website:** https://www.horizoncareservices.org
**Business type:** Healthcare staffing agency — supplying health and social care professionals to organisations across England

Horizon Care Services is a healthcare staffing agency operating across England. We supply vetted health and social care professionals to local authorities, NHS trusts, care homes, supported living providers, residential services, private healthcare organisations, and healthcare bodies that need staffing cover.

We do not market direct care packages to families or individuals through this website. Our services are aimed at organisations that need staff — for urgent cover, planned rota support, or longer-term placements.

## Services

### Healthcare Staffing
URL: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/

We supply skilled healthcare professionals to care organisations, NHS trusts, and local authorities at short or extended notice. Roles include:

- Registered Nurses (RGN, RMN, RNLD)
- Healthcare Assistants
- Support Workers
- Social Workers
- Occupational Therapists
- Physiotherapists

Available 24/7, including weekends and bank holidays. We accommodate single-shift requests and long-term contracts. All staff are DBS-checked, professionally registered where required, and verified against the relevant professional registers (NMC, HCPC, Social Work England).

### Common Staffing Situations We Support

- Urgent sickness cover
- Planned absence
- Recurring rota gaps
- Short-term workforce pressure
- Longer-term placements
- Specialist role requirements
- Weekend and bank holiday cover
- Hard-to-fill rota positions

## Geographic Coverage

We operate in:
- Bedfordshire
- Buckinghamshire
- Cambridgeshire
- Hertfordshire
- Manchester
- London

We also work across England more broadly and regularly extend into new areas. Contact us if your location is not listed.

## Our Approach

### Careful Selection
We are selective about the professionals we place. Every candidate is interviewed, reference-checked, and compliance-verified before joining our register.

### Setting-Led Matching
We look at experience, environment, and fit — not just availability. A care home, hospital ward, and supported living service need different workers.

### Honest About Capacity
We tell commissioning teams what we can and cannot deliver — including timescales and coverage. We do not overcommit.

### Clear Communication
You get clear updates on availability, suitability, and timescales. If we cannot safely meet a requirement, we say so.

## For Commissioning Organisations

We work with councils, local authorities, NHS trusts, care homes, residential services, and healthcare organisations. We respond to enquiries within 2 working hours for urgent requests and within 2 working days for planned requirements.

Contact: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/contact/
Phone: 020 3757 2767 or email contact@horizoncareservices.org

## Careers

We recruit nurses, healthcare assistants, support workers, and allied health professionals for flexible agency work across England. We provide structured onboarding, ongoing training, and a named coordinator for every worker on our register.

Work for us: https://www.horizoncareservices.org/work-for-us/

## Contact

- **Phone:** 020 3757 2767 — Monday to Friday, 9am to 5pm
- **Email:** contact@horizoncareservices.org — response within 2 working days (same day for urgent cover)
- **Address:** 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Manchester, M8 9LR
